title.zh: SQL注入原理分析：Oracle数据库靶场搭建
title.en: SQL Injection Analysis: Oracle Database Lab Setup

description.zh: 使用Docker搭建Oracle数据库SQL注入靶场，包含Apache+PHP+Oracle完整环境。
description.en: Use Docker to build Oracle database SQL injection lab, including complete Apache+PHP+Oracle environment.

codeBlocks.code:
#docker涓嬭浇oracle鏁版嵁搴撻暅鍍?docker pull registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/qida/oracle-xe-11g
#docker灏嗛暅鍍忓姞杞藉埌鍚嶇О涓簅racle鐨勫鍣ㄥ悗鍙拌繍琛岋紝骞舵槧灏勯暅鍍?521绔彛鍒版湰鍦?521绔彛
docker run -d -p 1521:1521 --name oracle registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/qida/oracle-xe-11g
#杩涘叆oracle瀹瑰櫒鐨勪氦浜掑紡shell
docker exec -it oracle bash

root@bd849e50bab4:/# sqlplus /nolog
SQL> conn sys/oracle as sysdba
Connected.

SQL> select name from v$database;

NAME
---------

XE

#寮€杈熺┖闂村缓搴?SQL> create tablespace pentest datafile '/tmp/pentest.dbf' size 100m;

Tablespace created.

#鍒涘缓pentest鐢ㄦ埛锛屽瘑鐮乸entest锛涢粯璁able鏄痯entest
SQL> create user pentest identified by pentest default tablespace pentest;

User created.
#璧嬫潈pentest - connect,resource,dba
SQL> grant connect,resource,dba to pentest;

Grant succeeded.

SQL> exit
Disconnected from Oracle Database 11g Express Edition Release 11.2.0.2.0 - 64bit Production
#pentest鐢ㄦ埛杩炴帴
root@bd849e50bab4:/# sqlplus pentest/pentest

Connected to:
Oracle Database 11g Express Edition Release 11.2.0.2.0 - 64bit Production

SQL> CREATE TABLE users (id number,name varchar(500),surname varchar(1000));

Table created.
#瀵煎叆鏁版嵁
SQL> INSERT INTO users (id, name, surname) VALUES (1, 'luther', 'blisset');
INSERT INTO users (id, name, surname) VALUES (2, 'fluffy', 'bunny');
INSERT INTO users (id, name, surname) VALUES (3, 'wu', 'ming');
INSERT INTO users (id, name, surname) VALUES (4, 'sqlmap/1.0-dev (http://sqlmap.org)', 'user agent header');
INSERT INTO users (id, name, surname) VALUES (5, NULL, 'nameisnull');
commit;

----------
NAME

luther
blisset

docker pull thomasbisignani/docker-apache-php-oracle
cd ~/learn/docker
mkdir oracle_samplePages && cd oracle_samplePages
touch index.php 
########
##閰嶇疆docker-apache-php-oracle杩欎釜闀滃儚鍚姩鏃讹細
##1銆?v :瀹夸富鏈烘枃浠跺す/Users/bin4xin/learn/docker/oracle_samplePages涓枃浠跺彲鍦ㄨ櫄鎷熸満鏂囦欢澶?var/www/html涓璁块棶鍒帮紱鍗筹細
########瀹夸富鏈?Users/bin4xin/learn/docker/oracle_samplePages鏂囦欢澶逛负docker-apache-php-oracle web鏈嶅姟鐨勬牴鐩綍
##2銆?p :鏄犲皠docker 80 绔彛鍒版湰鏈虹殑8090绔彛涓嬶紱
##3銆?d :鍚庡彴杩愯
########
docker run -p 8090:80 -d -v /Users/bin4xin/learn/docker/oracle_samplePages:/var/www/html thomasbisignani/docker-apache-php-oracle

" . $item . "
\n"; oci_free_statement($stid); oci_close($conn); ?>

select * from session_roles
# 褰撳墠鏁版嵁搴撶増鏈?select banner from sys.v_$version where rownum=1

select utl_inaddr.get_host_address from dual
# 鏈嶅姟鍣ㄦ搷浣滅郴缁?select member from v$logfile where rownum=1

content.zh: 数据库配置：创建pentest表空间，创建pentest用户并赋权connect,resource,dba
content.en: Database config: Create pentest tablespace, create pentest user and grant connect,resource,dba privileges
WEB service: docker-apache-php-oracle image, PHP uses oci_connect to connect database

content.zh: SQLMAP注入成功，可获取数据库信息
content.en: SQLMAP injection successful, database info retrieved
